---
title: "Cookbook Workflows"
---

# Cookbook Workflows

Dive into the reproducible workflows for DPmixGPD. Each vignette builds on the previous ones, so start with v00 and keep following the list.

## Starter broth
- [v00: Start here](articles/workflows/v00-start-here.html)
- [v01: Introduction](articles/workflows/v01-introduction.html)
- [v02: Available distributions](articles/workflows/v02-available-distributions.html)

## Entrées
- [v03: Compile & run](articles/workflows/v03-basic-model-compile-run.html)
- [v04: Backends & workflow](articles/workflows/v04-backends-and-workflow.html)

## Unconditional
- [v05: DPmix CRP](articles/workflows/v05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [v06: DPmix CRP extended](articles/workflows/v06-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [v07: DPmix SB](articles/workflows/v07-unconditional-DPmix-SB.html)
- [v08: DPmixGPD CRP](articles/workflows/v08-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
- [v09: DPmixGPD SB](articles/workflows/v09-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)

## Conditional
- [v10: DPmix CRP](articles/workflows/v10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [v11: DPmix SB](articles/workflows/v11-conditional-DPmix-SB.html)
- [v12: DPmixGPD CRP](articles/workflows/v12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
- [v13: DPmixGPD SB](articles/workflows/v13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)

## Causal
- [v14: No covariates](articles/workflows/v14-causal-no-x-CRP.html)
- [v15: With covariates](articles/workflows/v15-causal-x-no-ps-SB.html)
- [v16: Same backend CRP](articles/workflows/v16-causal-same-backend-CRP.html)
- [v17: Same backend SB](articles/workflows/v17-causal-same-backend-SB.html)
- [v18: Different backends CRP](articles/workflows/v18-causal-different-backends-CRP.html)
- [v19: Different backends SB](articles/workflows/v19-causal-different-backends-SB.html)

## Kitchen notes
- [v20: Troubleshooting](articles/workflows/v20-troubleshooting.html)
